reviews.comment:
Excelente atención, el señor que estaba el domingo 24/09/23 súper amable, destaco la predisposición en atenderte, excelente trato con la gente, muy honesto, baños súper limpitos, reciben débito y crédito sin problemas, recomiendo ir al lugar

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, the gentleman who was there on Sunday 9/24/23 was super friendly. I would highlight his willingness to assist you, excellent treatment of people, very honest, super clean bathrooms, they accept debit and credit cards without any problems. I recommend going to this place.
